title: jasminum nepalense
intro: Jasminum nepalense, also known as the Nepalese jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. This fragrant climber has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as nausea and vomiting. Jasminum nepalense can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy in various cultures.
